case_title: JEROME MARTIN S VS NASEY LARRY IND & DBA POST STREET AUTOMOTIVE CENTE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $814.82 FILED BY JEROME MARTIN S AS TO DEFENDANT NASEY LARRY IND & DBA POST STREET AUTOMOTIVE CENTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEROME MARTIN S IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NASEY LARRY IND & DBA POST STREET AUTOMOTIVE CENTE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
